--- revoke_on_all_tables_in_schema.sql
REVOKE INSERT, UPDATE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA db.sch FROM ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.PrivilegeOnAllTablesInSchema{
    Privileges: []ast.TablePrivilege{
      &ast.InsertPrivilege{
        Insert: 7,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
      &ast.UpdatePrivilege{
        Update: 15,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
    },
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 46,
            NameEnd: 48,
            Name:    "db",
          },
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 49,
            NameEnd: 52,
            Name:    "sch",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 63,
      NameEnd: 64,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE INSERT, UPDATE ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA db.sch FROM ROLE r
